violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 12/24/2024

The ice scoop located in the front ice caddy area was not in good repair. The ice scoop was disregarded, and establishment is going to use a spoon with a long handle until new ice scoop comes in. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/29/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the gasket on the low boy, and the table under the prep area have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/29/2023

The Floor in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Areas of low grout must be repaired, cracked tiles must be repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 06/29/2024
